features.title: Why Do Customers Choose Us?

aboutUs.title: About Hatoon & Diana
aboutUs.description: We believe that the abaya is more than just clothing; it is a reflection of culture and identity. We create abayas that express who you are, accompanying you through every moment with confidence and elegance.

hero.headline: Our Story
hero.title: It Started from a Very Personal Experience
hero.description: The idea for our store began from a very personal experience… the difficulty of finding abayas and hijabs that combine elegance, quality, and a modern touch all at once.

whoWeAre.headline: Who We Are
whoWeAre.title: Two Sisters, One Vision
whoWeAre.description: We are two sisters who believe that the hijab is not only a commitment but also a style, identity, and beauty. From this belief came our goal: to offer abayas, hijabs, and all hijab essentials with distinctive, feminine, and practical designs, while paying close attention to fabric quality and the small details that make all the difference.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: We carefully choose every piece as if we were choosing it for ourselves.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: We focus on the finest fabrics and meticulous details that make the difference.

elegance.title: Elegance
elegance.description: Feminine and modern designs that reflect your unique style.

philosophy.headline: Our Philosophy
philosophy.title: Chosen with Care
philosophy.description: We select every piece carefully, as if we were choosing it for ourselves. We focus on comfort, everyday elegance, and effortless styling to help every woman discover her own taste with ease.

cta.headline: More Than Just a Store
cta.title: A Space for Every Hijabi Woman
cta.description: This store is more than just a place to shop… it's a space for every hijabi woman who loves taking care of herself and expressing her beauty in her own unique way.

cta.title: Stay Updated
cta.description: Follow us on Instagram and stay updated with the latest offers and fashion trends

packaging.title: Elegant Packaging Just for You
packaging.description1: We wrap your order like a gift

footer.contactDescription: We are here to help you anytime. Don't hesitate to contact us whenever you need support.
